steps.title: Identify slope and intercept of the boundary line
steps.content: The shaded region is bounded by a line with $y$-intercept $-35$. The slope is steep — rise/run gives $25$ per unit (not $5$). So the boundary line is $y = 25x - 35$.

steps.title: Choose the correct inequality direction
steps.content:
The shading is above the boundary line — so for points in the region, $y$ is greater than $25x - 35$:
$$y > 25x - 35$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
